titleStmt.title: SII 29.7: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 7. (A.R. No. B. 459 of 1961-62.) DHARMAPURI, MOMINABAD TALUK, BHIR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Impression received from the Deputy Director, Archaeology, Aurangabad, Maharashtra.

It is records the grant of a wet land of one mattar extent by the side of a tank, one garden to its west and a house to god Kāḷēśvara by Dēmarasa, son of Mukutiya-maṁneya Muṁjarāṇe. The Five-hundred svāmis of mahāgrahāra of Lokkiguṁḍi is stated to be the protectors of this grant. The record mentions the god named Gavarēśvara.
It is dated in Jagadēkamalla year 2, Siddhārthin, Kārtika, śu. 15, Ādivāra [Śaka 941]. It corresponds to 1019 A.D., October 16, Friday.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya . svastiśrīma
ccāḷukya jagadēkamalla varṣada 2 sidhā
rttha saṁvatsarada kārtika śu 15 Ādivā
radaṁdu samasta prasastisahitaṁ śrī
matu mahāgrahāraṁ lokkiguṁḍi Ainū
rvva svāmigaḷu . dharmma kāḷēśvaradēvargge mu
kutiya maṁneya muṁjarāṇiyana maga
dēmarasaṁ biṭṭa śāsana maryyādeyeṁteṁ
daḍe gavarēśvaradēvara keyya[ha?]dāvaṇa dē
seya keyi keṟeyahaṭi Oḷagāgi
mattaru 1 bhāryada baḍagaṇa tōṁṭa 1 mane
Inti nitu jananavu Ainūrvvaruṁ prati
pāḷisuvaru . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō harēti vasaṁdharā (ṣaṣṭi)
Digital edition of SII 29.7 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
